name: Best Friend
wardenLine: You made HIM. Achievement noted. Framed, actually. He stays forever.

name: Teacher's Pet
wardenLine: You found my... that's not mine. I've never seen it. Keep it safe.

name: Certified Arsonist
wardenLine: Ten counts of arson. That's facility property, you know. Was.

name: Plumbers' Union
wardenLine: Five fires out. The safety committee would love you. There is no safety committee.

name: Ice to Meet You
wardenLine: Walking on water. Frozen water. Fine. Technically impressive.

name: Grounded
wardenLine: You were STANDING on the metal. Physics! It works! I love this job.

name: Chef
wardenLine: That was a company specimen. It had a name. It was Specimen.

name: Short Circuit
wardenLine: Water. On the drone. Do you know what those COST? Me neither. A lot, probably.

name: Marla's Favorite
description: Complete a trade with a prisoner.
wardenLine: Commerce. In MY facility. I'm adding it to both your files.

name: Librarian
description: Read every note in the facility.
wardenLine: You read ALL the graffiti. It's not literature, #67. It's vandalism with feelings.

name: It Comes Back
wardenLine: Place it, take it, place it, take it. The spring has feelings too. Probably dizzy ones.

name: Good Listener
wardenLine: You LISTEN. Nobody listens. This is the best relationship I've ever had.

name: Untouchable
wardenLine: Zero deaths. The recycling department is FURIOUS.

name: Early Checkout
wardenLine: Twelve minutes?! We have a two-night minimum. This is going on your invoice.
